tasks.title: Complete identity and namespace migration
tasks.description: Complete the Agents SDK identity, namespace, documentation, and safety-boundary migration.
tasks.successCriteria: Acceptance gate A1 passes without active legacy branding or unsafe ownership drift.

tasks.title: Build homepage, docs shell, information architecture, and item-page anatomy
tasks.description: Build the agents-sdk.com homepage, docs shell, eight-area information architecture, and registry item-page anatomy.
tasks.successCriteria: Acceptance gate A2 and governed desktop/mobile browser QA pass across all required flows.

tasks.title: Define and test the registry item contract
tasks.description: Define the strict versioned registry contract and validate every checked-in item and source relationship.
tasks.successCriteria: Acceptance gate A3 passes with dependency, source, documentation, test, and provenance integrity.

tasks.title: Ship init, add, list, diff, and doctor ownership loop
tasks.description: Ship the copy-owned CLI workflow with dependency planning, conflicts, local modification reporting, and rollback.
tasks.successCriteria: Acceptance gate A4 and the compiled clean-room CLI proof pass.

tasks.title: Ship and accept agent-chat
tasks.description: Ship Agent Chat as documented, tested, copy-owned source with browser-verified behavior.
tasks.successCriteria: The agent-chat portion of acceptance gate A5 passes.

tasks.title: Ship and accept human-approval
tasks.description: Ship Human Approval as documented, tested, copy-owned source with explicit allow and deny behavior.
tasks.successCriteria: The human-approval portion of acceptance gate A5 passes.

tasks.title: Ship and accept artifact-workspace
tasks.description: Ship Artifact Workspace as documented, tested, copy-owned source with responsive browser proof.
tasks.successCriteria: The artifact-workspace portion of acceptance gate A5 passes.

tasks.title: Ship approval-gates pattern and complete support-agent template
tasks.description: Ship the executable approval-gates pattern and a clean-room support-agent template composing all v0.1 components.
tasks.successCriteria: Acceptance gate A6 and the support-agent install, 11 tests, typecheck, and build proof pass.

tasks.title: Complete documentation and fresh-developer proof
tasks.description: Complete the documentation, package, and fresh-developer proof required for local v0.1 acceptance.
tasks.successCriteria: Acceptance gate A7 passes with site, API docs, package, and clean-room evidence.

tasks.title: Publish scoped packages and agents-sdk.com after clean release proof
tasks.description: Publish the scoped packages and accepted site only after external ownership and public release gates pass.
tasks.successCriteria: Acceptance gate A8 passes with published packages, live-site proof, tagged rollback evidence, and second-environment verification.
blockers: agents-sdk.com is not serving the release
npm namespace/domain/GitHub organization ownership is not proven

tasks.title: Secure or approve the @agents-sdk npm organization and release access
tasks.description: Confirm ownership and release access for the intended scoped npm namespace.
tasks.successCriteria: The @agents-sdk npm organization is secured or an approved release namespace is documented.

tasks.title: Approve public package and agents-sdk.com launch
tasks.description: Approve the public package and site launch after local acceptance gates A1 through A7 pass.
tasks.successCriteria: Houston records approval for the scoped package and agents-sdk.com public launch.

tasks.title: Approve restrained Enterprise path and BAMF attribution
tasks.description: Approve the secondary Enterprise path and restrained public BAMF attribution without changing the developer-first product.
tasks.successCriteria: Houston approves or revises the Enterprise link and Built by BAMF attribution.

tasks.title: Reconcile historical collision files
tasks.description: Prove custody for every visible and ignored * 2.* collision artifact, remove only non-unique snapshots, and restore raw-tree validation.
tasks.successCriteria: No collision artifact remains, unique evidence is preserved in Git or canonical context, and pnpm validate passes without quarantine.

tasks.title: Review and decide ADIL contract branch custody
tasks.description: Review codex/adil-contracts against current Agents SDK contracts and explicitly adapt, rebase, merge, archive, or reject its changes.
tasks.successCriteria: Every unique ADIL contract is dispositioned with evidence and the linked worktree can be retained or removed deliberately.

tasks.title: Establish remote and off-machine repository durability
tasks.description: Configure an approved remote or backup route and prove the committed repository and unmerged branch are recoverable off-machine.
tasks.successCriteria: Main and any retained branch have verified off-machine custody without exposing secrets or private material.

tasks.title: Restore supported You.md write authority
tasks.description: Re-register the lowercase Agents SDK checkout through the supported You.md project flow and verify local/remote task projection without bypassing authority guards.
tasks.successCriteria: The canonical checkout has a valid descriptor and authorized task/context writes succeed through supported You.md tooling.
